use_codes.desc: PRODUCING ALPHA ADRENERGIC ANTAGONISTIC ACTION IN A HOST

indications.text:
FLOMAX (tamsulosin hydrochloride, USP) capsules are indicated for the treatment of the signs and symptoms
of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) [see Clinical Studies (14)]. FLOMAX capsules are not indicated for the
treatment of hypertension.

Flomax® (tamsulosin hydrochloride) capsules are indicated for the treatment of the signs and
symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH). FLOMAX capsules are not indicated for
the treatment of hypertension.

symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH). FLOMAX capsules are not indicated for
the treatment of hypertension.
